372 Bfhat SamhitB

Should a king behold an ill-omened wagtail, he would not
meet with evil consequences, provided he engages himself in wor-
shipping Brahmins, preceptors, pious men and gods, and also
abstains from meat for one full week.
[The metre is
5rfiTp??f g fcr&ma \
hd4lkfn^n
The effects of the first sight of a wagtail will be felt within a
year; and those of the daily sight, before the end of the day itself.
The effects must be carefully determined after examining the direc-
tion, place, physical features, the Lagna, the asterism, position with
respect to the Sun etc.
[Cf.
sreir srcft |«r: i
5rfcT^fe% n
The good quarters are east, north and north-east. The auspicious
places are mentioned in verses 4-6 supra. The good physical features
are found in the Bhadra and Sampuma types (see verse 2 supra).
